input: Sản phẩm: Laptop Dell XPS 15. Kho: Kho Hồ Chí Minh. Cần trừ hàng đã allocate.
instruction: Kiểm tra tồn khả dụng của SKU-LAP-001 tại WH-HCM-01.
output: {"filters": {"sku": "SKU-LAP-001", "warehouse_id": 1}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 20, "metrics": ["available_quantity", "allocated_quantity", "on_hand_quantity"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, wi.quantity AS on_hand_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0) AS allocated_quantity, (wi.quantity - COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0)) AS available_quantity FROM warehouse_inventory wi JOIN products p ON p.id = wi.product_id LEFT JOIN document_items di ON di.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id AND d.status IN ('DRAFT','PENDING') WHERE wi.warehouse_id = 1 AND p.sku = 'SKU-LAP-001' GROUP BY p.sku, wi.quantity;", "target": "inventory"}

input: Prioritize lots that expire soonest and exclude quarantined inventory.
instruction: Show FEFO pick candidates for SKU-LAP-001 in WH-HCM-01.

output: {"filters": {"sku": "SKU-LAP-001", "warehouse_id": 2}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 20, "metrics": ["available_quantity", "allocated_quantity", "on_hand_quantity"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, wi.quantity AS on_hand_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0) AS allocated_quantity, (wi.quantity - COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0)) AS available_quantity FROM warehouse_inventory wi JOIN products p ON p.id = wi.product_id LEFT JOIN document_items di ON di.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id AND d.status IN ('DRAFT','PENDING') WHERE wi.warehouse_id = 2 AND p.sku = 'SKU-LAP-001' GROUP BY p.sku, wi.quantity;", "target": "inventory"}

output: {"filters": {"sku": "SKU-HAZ-009", "warehouse_id": 2}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 20, "metrics": ["available_quantity", "allocated_quantity", "on_hand_quantity"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, wi.quantity AS on_hand_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0) AS allocated_quantity, (wi.quantity - COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0)) AS available_quantity FROM warehouse_inventory wi JOIN products p ON p.id = wi.product_id LEFT JOIN document_items di ON di.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id AND d.status IN ('DRAFT','PENDING') WHERE wi.warehouse_id = 2 AND p.sku = 'SKU-HAZ-009' GROUP BY p.sku, wi.quantity;", "target": "inventory"}

output: {"filters": {"sku": "SKU-HAZ-009", "warehouse_id": 3}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 20, "metrics": ["available_quantity", "allocated_quantity", "on_hand_quantity"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, wi.quantity AS on_hand_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0) AS allocated_quantity, (wi.quantity - COALESCE(SUM(di.quantity), 0)) AS available_quantity FROM warehouse_inventory wi JOIN products p ON p.id = wi.product_id LEFT JOIN document_items di ON di.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id AND d.status IN ('DRAFT','PENDING') WHERE wi.warehouse_id = 3 AND p.sku = 'SKU-HAZ-009' GROUP BY p.sku, wi.quantity;", "target": "inventory"}

input: So sánh tổng quantity với products.reorder_point.
instruction: Liệt kê các SKU có tồn trong zone PICKING nhưng đã dưới reorder point.
output: {"filters": {"zone": "PICKING"}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["quantity", "reorder_point"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, p.name, SUM(i.quantity) AS total_quantity, p.reorder_point FROM inventory i JOIN products p ON p.id = i.product_id JOIN positions pos ON pos.id = i.position_id WHERE pos.zone = 'PICKING' GROUP BY p.sku, p.name, p.reorder_point HAVING SUM(i.quantity) < p.reorder_point ORDER BY total_quantity ASC LIMIT 50;", "target": "inventory"}

output: {"filters": {"zone": "QUARANTINE"}, "intent": "inventory_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["quantity", "reorder_point"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, p.name, SUM(i.quantity) AS total_quantity, p.reorder_point FROM inventory i JOIN products p ON p.id = i.product_id JOIN positions pos ON pos.id = i.position_id WHERE pos.zone = 'QUARANTINE' GROUP BY p.sku, p.name, p.reorder_point HAVING SUM(i.quantity) < p.reorder_point ORDER BY total_quantity ASC LIMIT 50;", "target": "inventory"}

input: Cần sort chứng từ mới nhất trước và kèm tổng tiền.
instruction: Tìm 20 chứng từ nhập kho trạng thái DRAFT trong 14 ngày gần nhất.
output: {"filters": {"days": 14, "doc_type": "INBOUND", "status": "DRAFT"}, "intent": "document_lookup", "limit": 20, "metrics": ["count", "amount"], "sql": "SELECT id, doc_no, doc_type, status, total_amount, created_at FROM documents WHERE doc_type = 'INBOUND' AND status = 'DRAFT' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;", "target": "documents"}

input: So sánh document_items.quantity với warehouse_inventory.quantity theo product.
instruction: Các sale order của Công ty An Phát đang pending nhưng chưa đủ tồn để post.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 101, "status": "PENDING"}, "intent": "document_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["shortage_quantity", "quantity"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, p.sku, di.quantity AS requested_quantity, COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) AS available_quantity, (di.quantity - COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0)) AS shortage_quantity FROM documents d JOIN document_items di ON di.document_id = d.id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouse_inventory wi ON wi.product_id = di.product_id WHERE d.customer_id = 101 AND d.doc_type = 'SALE' AND d.status = 'PENDING' AND di.quantity > COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) ORDER BY shortage_quantity DESC;", "target": "documents"}

input: Bối cảnh vận hành WMS: So sánh document_items.quantity với warehouse_inventory.quantity theo product.
instruction: Lập query template cho yêu cầu sau: Các sale order của Công ty An Phát đang pending nhưng chưa đủ tồn để post.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 101, "status": "PENDING"}, "intent": "document_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["shortage_quantity", "quantity"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, p.sku, di.quantity AS requested_quantity, COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) AS available_quantity, (di.quantity - COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0)) AS shortage_quantity FROM documents d JOIN document_items di ON di.document_id = d.id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouse_inventory wi ON wi.product_id = di.product_id WHERE d.customer_id = 101 AND d.doc_type = 'SALE' AND d.status = 'PENDING' AND di.quantity > COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) ORDER BY shortage_quantity DESC;", "target": "documents"}

input: Operational context: So sánh document_items.quantity với warehouse_inventory.quantity theo product.
instruction: Convert this WMS data request into a structured JSON query template: Các sale order của Công ty An Phát đang pending nhưng chưa đủ tồn để post.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 101, "status": "PENDING"}, "intent": "document_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["shortage_quantity", "quantity"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, p.sku, di.quantity AS requested_quantity, COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) AS available_quantity, (di.quantity - COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0)) AS shortage_quantity FROM documents d JOIN document_items di ON di.document_id = d.id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouse_inventory wi ON wi.product_id = di.product_id WHERE d.customer_id = 101 AND d.doc_type = 'SALE' AND d.status = 'PENDING' AND di.quantity > COALESCE(wi.quantity, 0) ORDER BY shortage_quantity DESC;", "target": "documents"}

input: Chỉ lấy vị trí active, chưa có inventory, ưu tiên capacity lớn.
instruction: Tìm vị trí trống trong zone PICKING của WH-HCM-01 để putaway.
output: {"filters": {"is_active": true, "warehouse_id": 1, "zone": "PICKING"}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 10, "metrics": ["capacity", "location"], "sql": "SELECT pos.id, pos.code, pos.zone, pos.capacity FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 1 AND pos.zone = 'PICKING' AND pos.is_active = 1 AND i.id IS NULL ORDER BY pos.capacity DESC, pos.code ASC LIMIT 10;", "target": "positions"}

output: {"filters": {"is_active": true, "warehouse_id": 1, "zone": "HAZMAT"}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 10, "metrics": ["capacity", "location"], "sql": "SELECT pos.id, pos.code, pos.zone, pos.capacity FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 1 AND pos.zone = 'HAZMAT' AND pos.is_active = 1 AND i.id IS NULL ORDER BY pos.capacity DESC, pos.code ASC LIMIT 10;", "target": "positions"}

input: Return used capacity, total capacity, and utilization percentage.
instruction: Warehouse utilization summary for WH-HCM-01 by zone.
output: {"filters": {"warehouse_id": 1}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["used_capacity", "capacity", "utilization_percent"], "sql": "SELECT pos.zone, SUM(i.quantity) AS used_capacity, SUM(pos.capacity) AS capacity, ROUND(SUM(i.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(pos.capacity), 0), 2) AS utilization_percent FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 1 GROUP BY pos.zone ORDER BY utilization_percent DESC;", "target": "warehouses"}

output: {"filters": {"is_active": true, "warehouse_id": 2, "zone": "HAZMAT"}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 10, "metrics": ["capacity", "location"], "sql": "SELECT pos.id, pos.code, pos.zone, pos.capacity FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 2 AND pos.zone = 'HAZMAT' AND pos.is_active = 1 AND i.id IS NULL ORDER BY pos.capacity DESC, pos.code ASC LIMIT 10;", "target": "positions"}

input: Return used capacity, total capacity, and utilization percentage.
instruction: Warehouse utilization summary for WH-HN-02 by zone.
output: {"filters": {"warehouse_id": 2}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["used_capacity", "capacity", "utilization_percent"], "sql": "SELECT pos.zone, SUM(i.quantity) AS used_capacity, SUM(pos.capacity) AS capacity, ROUND(SUM(i.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(pos.capacity), 0), 2) AS utilization_percent FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 2 GROUP BY pos.zone ORDER BY utilization_percent DESC;", "target": "warehouses"}

input: Return used capacity, total capacity, and utilization percentage.
instruction: Warehouse utilization summary for WH-DN-03 by zone.
output: {"filters": {"warehouse_id": 3}, "intent": "warehouse_lookup", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["used_capacity", "capacity", "utilization_percent"], "sql": "SELECT pos.zone, SUM(i.quantity) AS used_capacity, SUM(pos.capacity) AS capacity, ROUND(SUM(i.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(pos.capacity), 0), 2) AS utilization_percent FROM positions pos LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.warehouse_id = 3 GROUP BY pos.zone ORDER BY utilization_percent DESC;", "target": "warehouses"}

input: Chỉ tính chứng từ SALE, status POSTED.
instruction: Tổng giá trị đơn hàng đã post của Công ty An Phát trong tháng này.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 101, "doc_type": "SALE", "status": "POSTED"}, "intent": "customer_lookup", "limit": 1, "metrics": ["amount", "count"], "sql": "SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(d.id) AS posted_orders, SUM(d.total_amount) AS total_amount FROM customers c JOIN documents d ON d.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.id = 101 AND d.doc_type = 'SALE' AND d.status = 'POSTED' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', d.created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY c.id, c.name;", "target": "customers"}

input: Delay means expected_ship_date is before today and status is not POSTED.
instruction: List delayed outbound documents for customer Công ty An Phát.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 101, "status_not": "POSTED"}, "intent": "customer_lookup", "limit": 30, "metrics": ["count", "days_late"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, d.status, d.expected_ship_date, (CURRENT_DATE - d.expected_ship_date) AS days_late FROM documents d WHERE d.customer_id = 101 AND d.doc_type = 'OUTBOUND' AND d.status != 'POSTED' AND d.expected_ship_date < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 30;", "target": "documents"}

output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 102, "doc_type": "SALE", "status": "POSTED"}, "intent": "customer_lookup", "limit": 1, "metrics": ["amount", "count"], "sql": "SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(d.id) AS posted_orders, SUM(d.total_amount) AS total_amount FROM customers c JOIN documents d ON d.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.id = 102 AND d.doc_type = 'SALE' AND d.status = 'POSTED' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', d.created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY c.id, c.name;", "target": "customers"}

input: Delay means expected_ship_date is before today and status is not POSTED.
instruction: List delayed outbound documents for customer Mega Retail.
output: {"filters": {"customer_id": 102, "status_not": "POSTED"}, "intent": "customer_lookup", "limit": 30, "metrics": ["count", "days_late"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, d.status, d.expected_ship_date, (CURRENT_DATE - d.expected_ship_date) AS days_late FROM documents d WHERE d.customer_id = 102 AND d.doc_type = 'OUTBOUND' AND d.status != 'POSTED' AND d.expected_ship_date < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 30;", "target": "documents"}

input: Dựa trên document_items của chứng từ OUTBOUND hoặc SALE đã POSTED.
instruction: Báo cáo top 10 SKU xuất kho nhiều nhất trong 7 ngày gần đây.
output: {"filters": {"days": 7, "status": "POSTED"}, "intent": "report_lookup", "limit": 10, "metrics": ["quantity", "count"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, p.name, SUM(di.quantity) AS shipped_quantity FROM document_items di JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id WHERE d.doc_type IN ('OUTBOUND','SALE') AND d.status = 'POSTED' AND d.posted_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY p.sku, p.name ORDER BY shipped_quantity DESC LIMIT 10;", "target": "reporting"}

input: Show only items with physical quantity different from system quantity.
instruction: Cycle count discrepancy report for the last 7 days.
output: {"filters": {"days": 7, "has_discrepancy": true}, "intent": "report_lookup", "limit": 100, "metrics": ["discrepancy_quantity", "count"], "sql": "SELECT ar.count_no, p.sku, ar.system_qty, ar.physical_qty, (ar.physical_qty - ar.system_qty) AS discrepancy_quantity FROM audit_reports ar JOIN products p ON p.id = ar.product_id WHERE ar.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' AND ar.physical_qty != ar.system_qty ORDER BY ABS(ar.physical_qty - ar.system_qty) DESC LIMIT 100;", "target": "reporting"}

output: {"filters": {"days": 14, "status": "POSTED"}, "intent": "report_lookup", "limit": 10, "metrics": ["quantity", "count"], "sql": "SELECT p.sku, p.name, SUM(di.quantity) AS shipped_quantity FROM document_items di JOIN documents d ON d.id = di.document_id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id WHERE d.doc_type IN ('OUTBOUND','SALE') AND d.status = 'POSTED' AND d.posted_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY p.sku, p.name ORDER BY shipped_quantity DESC LIMIT 10;", "target": "reporting"}

input: Show only items with physical quantity different from system quantity.
instruction: Cycle count discrepancy report for the last 14 days.
output: {"filters": {"days": 14, "has_discrepancy": true}, "intent": "report_lookup", "limit": 100, "metrics": ["discrepancy_quantity", "count"], "sql": "SELECT ar.count_no, p.sku, ar.system_qty, ar.physical_qty, (ar.physical_qty - ar.system_qty) AS discrepancy_quantity FROM audit_reports ar JOIN products p ON p.id = ar.product_id WHERE ar.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' AND ar.physical_qty != ar.system_qty ORDER BY ABS(ar.physical_qty - ar.system_qty) DESC LIMIT 100;", "target": "reporting"}

input: Return posted quantity versus requested quantity by line.
instruction: What is the current status and fulfillment progress of SO-2026-0001?
output: {"filters": {"doc_no": "SO-2026-0001"}, "intent": "order_status", "limit": 50, "metrics": ["quantity", "progress_percent"], "sql": "SELECT d.doc_no, d.status, p.sku, di.quantity AS requested_quantity, di.posted_quantity, ROUND(di.posted_quantity * 100.0 / NULLIF(di.quantity, 0), 2) AS progress_percent FROM documents d JOIN document_items di ON di.document_id = d.id JOIN products p ON p.id = di.product_id WHERE d.doc_no = 'SO-2026-0001' ORDER BY di.line_no ASC;", "target": "orders"}
